decision.summary: There is still no cleaner daily edge than the already-resolved 76k reach, so the right move is to stay patient.
decision.rationale: The latest Beecthor thesis still allows one more upside push before the broader bearish continuation, but the original clean daily expression has already become the 76k reach market and that line remains fully priced at 99.9%-1.0%, which is invalid under the hard 85% cap. BTC spot is around 75,850, only modestly above the session midpoint and still well below the 24h high, so upgrading immediately to the 77k reach would mean forcing a second extension rather than taking the cleanest same-day setup. The weekly 80k reach remains open but effectively discarded for slot purposes at sub-20% probability, and there is still no clearly superior floor setup. The correct action is to hold and avoid chasing the next daily strike late in the session.
